summary: Comprehensive testing of GoSocial SaaS platform third iteration focusing on landing page, Google OAuth integration, 7-day trial functionality, and billing system. Backend APIs achieved 97.6% success rate, frontend UI and navigation fully functional.

minor_issues.issue: Trial user registration returns 400 because trial@test.com already exists
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - user already registered from previous tests

passed_tests: Landing page renders at / with hero section, features, pricing, CTAs
Landing page 'Sign In' button navigates to /login
Landing page 'Start Free Trial' button navigates to /login
7-day free trial badge visible on landing page and pricing section
Login page has 'Continue with Google' button on both Sign In and Sign Up tabs
Login page 'Back' button goes to landing page
Login page email/password auth works with test@gosocial.com/test123
POST /api/auth/google endpoint exists and correctly rejects invalid sessions (401/400)
GET /api/billing/subscription shows trial status with days_remaining for trial user
Trial user shows Growth plan with 'Trial - 6 days left' badge in settings
Dashboard loads at /dashboard after login with full data and analytics
All sidebar navigation works (leads, crm, analytics, templates, billing, settings)
Settings page shows subscription status with trial badge and days remaining
Billing page accessible from sidebar navigation
All backend APIs functioning: leads, conversations, AI suggestions, analytics, templates, settings
Billing plans endpoint returns correct pricing: Starter $29, Growth $79, Enterprise $199
